title: Rename device - UI, device doesn't support
scenario: Verify that the "Device Name" setting is hidden for devices that do not support renaming, and only appears for supported models (Free 60+/Osprey, Free 60/Tern, Free 20/Emu, Sync 20, Sync 20M, Sync 40).
steps: Identify the device type/model being tested.
Check if the device is one of the supported models: Free 60+/Osprey, Free 60/Tern, Free 20/Emu, Sync 20, Sync 20M, Sync 40 (TBD).
If the device is NOT in the supported list, verify that the 'Device Name' setting does NOT appear in the UI.
If the device IS in the supported list, verify that the 'Device Name' setting DOES appear in the UI.
expected: The "Device Name" setting should only appear in the UI for supported devices (Free 60+/Osprey, Free 60/Tern, Free 20/Emu, Sync 20, Sync 20M, Sync 40 (TBD)). For all other devices, the setting should be hidden.
